title: University of Kashmir (KU) Results 2026 Announced

detail.title: University of Kashmir (KU) Results 2026 Announced
detail.short_info: University of Kashmir (KU) released results on February 13, 2026 for BUMS Final Year (Batch 2020) and other courses. Check direct links, notification list, and step-by-step guide to view KU results 2026.

content.text: The KU has released the result for Notification No. 05 BUMS Final Year (Batch 2020) examination conducted in November 2025 on February 13, 2026. This is the latest among multiple result notifications published by the university for professional and non-professional courses in February 2026.
The university regularly updates its official results portal with new notifications. Below are the latest declarations:

rows: Notification No.05 BUMS Final Year Batch 2020 of November 2025

sections.heading: How to Check University of Kashmir (KU) Results 2026 Online

items: Visit the official KU results portal: Click Here
Scroll to the Latest Results section on the homepage.
Find your result by date, notification name, or category.
Click the View Result link next to your course.
The result will open as a PDF or webpage.
Download or print the result for your records.

content.text: Note: Most KU results are published as notification lists; roll number entry is usually not required.
